mapper.select: SELECT rr.review_report_id, rr.review_id, rr.member_id, rr.review_report_reason, rr.review_report_status, rr.review_report_created_at, rr.review_report_content, reporter.member_name AS reporter_name, rv.review_title, rv.member_id AS reported_member_id, author.member_name AS reported_member_name FROM review_report rr JOIN member reporter ON rr.member_id = reporter.member_id JOIN review rv ON rr.review_id = rv.review_id JOIN member author ON rv.member_id = author.member_id ORDER BY rr.review_report_created_at DESC
